data.title: The Single Best Way To Trade Apple's Upcoming Earnings
data.description: AAPL earnings on Oct 31 offer opportunity for long strangle trade to profit from big price move. Buy 1 Nov 250 calls and 1 Nov 212.5 puts for $0.63.

data.title: West Pharmaceutical's Q3 Performance Shows Rising Demand For Syringes, Company Boosts Annual Forecast And Dividend
data.description: West Pharmaceutical Services reported Q3 adjusted EPS of $1.85, beating estimates, with $746.9 million in sales. Updated 2024 guidance reflects higher EPS and sales.

data.title: Boeing Strike Drags On: Union Contract Rejection 'Adds Further Uncertainty, Costs, Recovery Delays,' Says Analyst
data.description: Boeing Co. striking machinists overwhelmingly rejected the company's latest offer in a union member vote tallied late Wednesday.
